nodes.text: I've been waiting for a challenger like you!
Step no further unless you dare to fight!
I challenge anyone who passes this road!
You look like a worthy opponent!
Many have tried — none have bested me!
The spirits guide me in every battle!
I train day and night for moments like this!
Your journey ends here, unless you dare fight!
I have trained my companions for just such a meeting!
Do you feel that? The air trembles before battle!
Every road has its toll, and mine is a battle!
I have not lost a match this season — care to try?
Fortune favours the bold. Are you bold?
